title: Adding Transfection and Sample to Plate
author: Opentrons

steps.instruction: This protocol will transfer scattered sample tubes to a specified destination plate according to a csv. The csv header should read `sample well, sample slot, destination well`. Include the header in the csv and specify the volumes below. THe protocol will automatically pause if the user runs out of tips, rprompting the user to replace tips. A P20 or P300 pipette is specified depending on the volume selected by the user. Liquid height tracking is performed on the 50mL tube so that the pipette does not submerge.
Add samples to plate according to csv
If transfection mix not selected, protocol will end
If transfection mix is selected, transfection mix will be added to plate depending on user-specified volume
